title: athyrium ruilicola
intro: Athyrium ruilicola, also known as Chinese Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to China, characterized by its delicate fronds and lush foliage. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Athyrium ruilicola can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves for topical application.
